name: Model-flexible attribution, installer split, versioned workspace updates
objective: Remove hardcoded model pins from executor defs and commit-attribution text, split the monolithic installer into installer/ with a build step that emits the single committed distributable, and add CHANGELOG.md + integer workspace versioning surfaced by /update-workspace

review.note: All three intent jobs delivered: model-inherit executors + rule-based attribution; installer split into installer/ with committed build product and drift guard (three modes byte-identical); integer workspace versioning + CHANGELOG surfaced by /update-workspace. Docs consolidated: decisions v0014, operations v0009, architecture v0002.
